<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<title>Territorial.io</title>
<meta name="description" content="Territorial.io - The Art of Conquest">
<meta name="keywords"
content="territorial.io, territorial, territorial game, conquest game, conquer game, territory game">
<meta name="author" content="David Tschacher">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, maximum-scale=1">

<style>
html,
body {
overflow: hidden;
padding: 0;
margin: 0;
background: black;
color: white;
}

* {
box-sizing: border-box;
}

a {
color: rgb(225, 225, 255);
}
</style>
</head>

<canvas id="canvasA" width="128" height="128"></canvas>
